name: freebuff-aaa-platform
description: AI Automation Agency Platform - WhatsApp Business Automation

scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:web
scripts.db:migrate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:push: cd backend && npx prisma db push
scripts.lint: concurrently "cd backend && npm run lint" "cd web && npm run lint"
scripts.setup: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../web && npm install && cd ../mobile && npm install && cd ..
